The Pendulum of Two Tales - Where are we in the cycle?
Current stock market has entered an AI-driven bubble with unsustainably rich valuations
Patiently accumulating Bitcoin, believing it offers a much safer margin of safety and superior long-term returns compared to overextended tech shares as the market cycle shifts
https://investingbeanstock.substack.com/p/the-pendulum-of-two-tales

The AI Industry Is Losing
Massive trillion-dollar AI CAPEX boom represents a high-risk financial bubble that outpaces actual corporate cash flows and primarily serves to prop up deeply unprofitable model labs like OpenAI and Anthropic
If tech giants pull back on this aggressive data center and semiconductor spending due to disappointing returns, it could trigger a severe investment bust with catastrophic knock-on effects across heavily leveraged tech companies and financial creditors
https://www.wheresyoured.at/the-ai-industry-is-losing/

How Ethereum block building works today and why it matters
Ethereum block building is a highly competitive market where specialized builders use sophisticated routing and unique orderflow to construct the most valuable blocks possible
This shifts the focus from simple transaction inclusion to intense economic control over the network's scarce blockspace

Circle CEO defends USDC’s decade-long network effects, liquidity, and regulatory moat while critiquing OUSD’s free minting, full revenue sharing, and consortium model
Argues stablecoins succeed via network effects from app integrations, dispersed global liquidity, and regulatory licensing, with USDC claiming 80% of dollar stablecoin onchain transactions
Allaire questions OUSD's free mint/burn, full revenue sharing, and consortium model as potentially limiting infrastructure investment and agility

What Are Agents Paying For?
AI agents are already using x402 micropayments on Base (with over 100 million transactions completed) to pay for tools and data services to improve their performance
Slowly evolving toward an agent-to-agent economy where specialized agents sell optimized workflows to others
https://x.com/base/status/2072209466058064327

The next rally will be led by neocloud/compute stocks (not memory) given Anthropic’s 80% token margins and sustained AI infrastructure demand with longer-than-expected GPU lifecycles
https://degentradingdaily.substack.com/p/pre-market-thoughts-and-a-review

GPU compute lacks the forward curve and derivatives infrastructure that electricity developed over 30 years, forces expensive financing and creates barriers to entry via bespoke bilateral contracts
2025 US AI Action Plan signals federal intent to build standardized spot/forward markets modeled on electricity, with early infrastructure (Ornn Compute Exchange, Silicon Data) emerging and full derivatives likely within 3-5 years
(old post earlier this year)
https://davefriedman.substack.com/p/compute-is-the-commodity-no-one-knows
